title: Beetle rearing media
steps: First, add dry ingredients A B 1 component amount 2 cycloheximide 0.175 g 3 Wesson's salt mixture 0.625 g 4 yeast 4 g 5 corn starch 4 g 6 casein 5 g 7 agar 15 g 8 sucrose 2.5 g 9 redbay sawdust 100 g
Put a double-layered cotton gauze on the mouth of the filled tubes. The cap is pre-drilled with holes that allow aeration and prevent contamination.
Autoclave the filled tube at 121 °C for 30 min.
Put autoclved tubes in an oven at 55°C for two days. (cotton gauze and cap remains on).
Second, add wet ingredients A B 1 component amount 2 wheat germ oil 1.25ml 3 95％ ethanol 2.5ml 4 deionized water 290ml
The recipe is for filling c.a. 18⁠—20 falcon tubes (⁠50ml).
To compress the media, use a clean 15ml falcon tube with a cap on, and press the media until it gets compressed.
Mix all the ingredients thoroughly and fill in 50ml falcon tubes.
creator: Yin-Tse Huang
